title: Stopped tenant → wakes on next message → queued messages replayed
evidence: All 7 TC-003 assertions passed (109/109 total e2e tests): - ✓ TC-003: tenant is ACTIVE after initial provisioning - ✓ TC-003: stop tenant via POST /v1/tenants/:id/stop → status becomes STOPPED - ✓ TC-003: relay returns HTTP 200 immediately when sending message to stopped tenant - ✓ TC-003: relay calls /v1/tenants/:id/start on the stopped tenant - ✓ TC-003: tenant wakes up and becomes ACTIVE - ✓ TC-003: first queued message is DELIVERED after wake-up - ✓ TC-003: subsequent message delivered; message_queue rows are in FIFO order Duration: 4321ms. Agent output captured in agent-output.txt.
